summary: Comprehensive testing of Catholic Professionals PNG website completed. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend functionality excellent with minor lightbox interaction issue. Contact form integration successful.

ui_bugs.issue: Overlay intercepts click events, requires force click to open lightbox
ui_bugs.workaround: Force click bypasses the overlay issue

passed_tests: All 13 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with hero section, bento grid, features, gallery preview
Navigation between all pages (Home, About, Gallery, Events, News, Contact)
About page mission/vision sections and leadership team display
Events page featured event and filter functionality
Contact form submission and success message display
Traditional Catholic aesthetics (cream, gold, burgundy colors)
Typography using Cormorant Garamond and proper fonts
All 234+ images from Highlights folder loading correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix gallery lightbox overlay interception issue - the hover overlay div is preventing direct clicks on gallery images. Consider adjusting z-index or click event handling.
